message:
web: Move logs index filtering to SQL

- Add search and repoId params to getTranscriptsPaginated query
- Search filters on summary and preview (first prompt) using LIKE
- Repo filter supports specific repo ID or null for private-only
- Fetch repos separately for dropdown options
- Add debounced search input (300ms) to reduce API calls
- Refetch on filter change instead of filtering in memory

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/doj8m16wjidn3697l3ot441v
